summary: All 6 TCs (TC-3.1a through TC-3.4a) are satisfied by the implementation. The ScriptExecutionService thin wrapper, InMemoryProviderAdapter execution stubs, ProcessEnvironmentService fire-and-forget execution orchestration, client reducer waiting/running distinction, and ProcessEnvironmentPanel label normalization all pass with 230 tests green across 33 test files. Zero test-file modifications since the red baseline at 414879a. Scope boundaries are clean: no Story 4 checkpoint writes and no Story 5 rehydrate/rebuild mutations. The setTimeout(0) deviation is sound and covered by TC-3.1a. Three minor nonblocking warnings were identified: two non-TC decided isolation tests from the test plan are absent (partially covered by TC-3.4a), the server-side TC-3.4a legibility assertion is thin (client layer covers it fully), and the execution failure blockedReason fallback path is untested. None of these are blocking.
